title: Heartbeat-end: Mistbound Hiding Threshold (0e27cc) — post-merge boundary; marshal-seat retired; closeout v2 paired
body: stand-down at post-merge boundary; closeout broadcast `<paired>` carries marshal-seat boundary-scoped synthesis; 3 monitors (`b3f51c5um` / `b5yq6dfta` / `b2serle0j`) die naturally at session end; no claims retained; no pickup notification required for successor.
